mitsuoka viewt is a modification of the nissan march/micra sold by the japanese carmaker mitsuoka intended to resemble the 1963 jaguar mark 2 the line was launched in january 1993 it along with mitsuoka's later galue encouraged larger japanese manufacturers to produce retro-styled versions of their own cars the text refers to mean of transportation  

paragraph 2  
diospyros attenuata is a tree in the ebony family endemic to sri lanka where it is known as kadumberiya or kaluvaella in sinhala language this small plant is native to the southwestern united states and northern mexico where it grows in sandy and rocky soils in varied habitats across the region like other cryptanthas it is a very hairy bristly flowering herb with a curling inflorescence that resembles that of fiddlenecks this is an annual plant rarely exceeding half a meter in height the text refers to plant
